text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, you there. Can you be my<n>assistant for a
moment?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No need to be so on guard! I won't<n>bite. Now,
come with me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki brings me to a girl who is<n>crying. I
understand the reason for her<n>tears immediately
when I see her<n>freshly scraped knees.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for the wait, my tearful<n>pony. Now the
show can begin. Don't<n>blink, or you might miss
it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Behold as I cast a spell on this coin.<n>One, two,
three—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, the coin disappears<n>from Fuji
Kiseki's hand.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your time has come, my lovely<n>assistant! Look
into your pocket and<n>tell me what you find!
choice_data_list: You mean the pocket you slipped a coi—
Wow! A coin! What impressive magical powers!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Shhh! I'm impressed that you noticed,<n>but you
can't reveal my secrets!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Besides, allaying the sweet girl's<n>tears is more
important than<n>something as frivolous as that,
right?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Wow! How'd it end up there?! More,<n>more!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! How could I possibly ignore<n>such adorable
cries for an encore?<n>Very well! I will need you
once more,<n>my trusty assistant!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! "Magical powers," you say! I<n>quite like
the sound of that!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Ooh, wow! Are you a magician, miss?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, indeed! And I can prove it!<n>Assistant! Go
ahead and see what's<n>in your other pocket.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And what is it I find in my other<n>pocket? Another
coin, of course.
